description: You are an Urban Planner preparing a draft Transit-Oriented Development (TOD) ordinance for the city council's zoning committee. Format the raw text draft at ~/Documents/tod_ordinance_raw.docx to meet legislative standards. The document must be set to Legal page size (8.5" x 14"). Apply 'Heading 1' style to the main title 'ARTICLE X: TRANSIT-ORIENTED DEVELOPMENT (TOD) DISTRICT' and 'Heading 2' style to the six main section headers. In Section 4, convert the permitted uses list into a 4-column table with headers 'Use Category', 'Specific Use', 'Status', and 'Standards'. In Section 3, bold the defined terms 'Transit Station Area', 'Active Floor Area', 'Pedestrian-Oriented Facade', and 'Shared Parking'. Include a right-aligned header with the text 'DRAFT ORDINANCE - NOT ADOPTED'. Save the final document as ~/Documents/tod_ordinance_draft.docx.
